title: Squirrel Removal in Bedford Park, Bronx | $900-$2,500
metaDescription: Professional squirrel removal services in Bedford Park, Bronx. Humane trapping, exclusion & damage repair. Licensed experts serving 10458. Call for fast service!
intro: Bedford Park homeowners and businesses face frequent squirrel intrusions, especially in the area's many multi-family homes and older buildings near Mosholu Parkway. Our professional squirrel removal services protect your property from these persistent rodents that can damage attics, wiring, and insulation. Best Pest Control NYC provides humane, effective squirrel removal tailored to Bedford Park's unique residential architecture.
whyUs: Best Pest Control NYC brings over 15 years of experience serving Bedford Park and the greater Bronx area with licensed, insured technicians who understand local squirrel behavior patterns. We offer same-day emergency response, humane removal methods, comprehensive exclusion work, and warranties on all our squirrel control services.
localContext: Bedford Park's tree-lined streets near Lehman College and proximity to the Bronx Park create ideal habitats for gray squirrels seeking entry into homes. The neighborhood's characteristic pre-war apartment buildings and single-family homes with peaked roofs and older construction often have vulnerable entry points that squirrels exploit during nesting season.

faqs.question: How much does squirrel removal cost in Bedford Park?
faqs.answer: Squirrel removal in Bedford Park typically ranges from $900 to $2,500 depending on the severity of the infestation, number of entry points, and extent of damage. This includes humane trapping, exclusion work to seal entry points, and cleanup. We provide free inspections and detailed estimates for all Bedford Park properties.

faqs.question: How do I know if I have squirrels in my Bedford Park home?
faqs.answer: Common signs include scratching or scurrying noises in your attic or walls, especially during early morning and evening hours, visible damage to roof soffits or vents, droppings in the attic, chewed wiring or insulation, and squirrels entering or exiting your roof line. If you notice any of these signs in your Bedford Park home, contact us immediately for an inspection.

faqs.question: Are squirrel removal methods humane and legal in the Bronx?
faqs.answer: Yes, we use only humane, NYC-compliant removal methods including live trapping and exclusion techniques. All squirrels are handled according to New York State wildlife regulations. We never use poisons or harmful methods, and we focus on permanent exclusion to prevent future entry while ensuring the safety of both your family and the animals.

faqs.question: How quickly can you respond to a squirrel problem in Bedford Park?
faqs.answer: We offer same-day and next-day service for most Bedford Park squirrel emergencies. Our team is familiar with the neighborhood and can typically arrive within 2-4 hours for urgent situations. We understand that squirrels can cause significant damage quickly, so we prioritize rapid response times throughout the 10458 area and surrounding Bronx neighborhoods.
